name: Cat Block Puzzle
description: Welcome to Cozy Cat – the ultimate cozy block puzzle experience! Get ready to stretch your brain and warm your heart! In this adorable tangram-style puzzle game, your goal is to drag and drop uniquely shaped, sleepy cats into the grid to perfectly fill the board. Each cat has its own special posture, making every level a delightful spatial challenge. It starts simple, but as the grids grow larger and the cat shapes get trickier, youll need smart strategy and clever positioning to complete the picture. Can you find the perfect spot for every fluffy friend? Game Features: Purr-fect Block Puzzles: Drag, drop, and fit adorable cat blocks into
instructions: Desktop PC Left-Click and Hold on a cat block to pick it up Drag the cat into the grid Release the mouse button to place it Mobile Tablet Tap and Hold your finger on a cat block Drag it into the target grid Lift your finger to drop and lock it
